title: Broken tracking of symbol entries when inheriting classes

features.name: class inheritance with field initialized by later method call
features.description: Code should include a class that extends another class, where a field is initialized by calling a method defined later in the same class
features.snippet:
class Foo; endclass
class Bar extends Foo; int m_field = get_1(); function int get_1(); return 1; endfunction endclass

features.name: method called in field initializer before its definition in class
features.description: Code should include a class field initialized by calling a method where the method definition appears after the field declaration in the class body
features.snippet: class Bar; int m_field = get_1(); function int get_1(); return 1; endfunction endclass
